expansion_intent.objective: Move Panchang & Festival View from four-location static pilot to governed expanded active calculation coverage.

date_basis.required_next_contract: AG74C must define date normalization, timezone day-boundary handling and invalid-date fallback.

location_basis.required_next_contract: AG74C must define approved location schema, timezone contract, coordinate precision and fallback.

observance_basis.required_next_contract: AG74C must define observance matching keys and regional-method disclaimers.
